replies.msg: 聽日放映會？播 D 乜？

I highly recommend the restaurant in Taiwan Cha Hotel. It has an unusual menu. It offers a buffet breakfast and a menu of four courses. For lunch there're a buffet lunch and a three course set menu. It also offers a buffet supper and a choice of menu. I chose beef served with onions from the menu while my cousin ordered a vegetable dish from the menu. The inside of the beef is raw while the outside is cooked. Onions can be eaten raw or cooked. Its cafe also has an excellent menu. I have a lunch reservation at the cafe for two people for twenty five past two this Saturday.

replies.msg: 國民黨總統候選人韓國瑜今晚(9日)在總統府前凱道舉辦造勢大會，喊出要號召百萬韓粉上街頭。韓營近期也在電視、網路上強打文宣廣告，要靠韓粉的動員力衝刺最後選情。今活動下午4點才開始，但2點多，人潮就已經塞滿凱道，直逼中山南路景福門口，人潮爆量；主辦單位在４點半時喊出凱道現場目前已有10萬人，5點40分時，喊出現場20萬人。《蘋果新聞網》從5點開始全程直播。
